Higher education

AI capability built for higher education.

Your staff move from anxious bystanders to confident, capable practitioners. Hours saved, tracked and reported - not estimated.

Built by people who worked inside universities - not consultants who studied it from the outside.

What we offer

Everything your institution needs.

Staff capability programmes

Role-specific workshops built around real HE tasks, not generic AI theory.

Get in Touch

34%

of HE staff say their institution’s stance on AI affects their likelihood to stay. That is a retention question, not a training question.

Jisc Digital Experience Insights, 2024

Talk to us about retention →

Built from inside higher education.

We know what a REF return looks like. We know what clearing does to professional services teams. We know why academics distrust anything that feels imposed on them. We know this because we worked inside universities before we built WorkSmart-AI - and that context shapes every session we design.

  • REF cycles
  • Clearing
  • Exam boards
  • NSS pressures
  • Academic scepticism
  • UKCISA fee status

Our approach

From uncertainty to confident AI adoption.

01

Free consultation

Map where your institution stands and where the real opportunities are.

02

Needs analysis

A written report on staff readiness by role - specific enough to act on.

03

Tailored workshops

Built around your institution, your roles, your working calendar.

04

On-demand courses

Extend learning to staff at scale, available when it suits them.

05

Strategic roadmap

Translate outcomes into a board-ready institutional AI plan.

06

Ongoing support

Drop-ins, resources, senior team check-ins. A partnership, not a handover.

Book a call

“

Students see AI skills as essential, but institutional support lags behind. While over two-thirds believe AI skills are essential to thrive in today’s world, fewer than half feel their teaching staff are helping them develop those skills.

HEPI / Kortext Student Generative AI Survey, 2026

Ready to give your institution a structured approach to AI?

Book a free 45-minute consultation. No pitch - just a clear picture of where you stand.
